rationale: Plan v10 is implementation-ready as declared and is fully consistent with governing spec v2.7 (D24–D32 freeze the v2.4–v2.7 semantics into executable contracts without modifying the spec), the repository trust model, and its own D1–D32 decisions and exit criteria. Spine remains read-only (merkle-dag import only, reverse forbidden); Clotho is advisory-only with bidirectional mechanical proofs (inbound real-path/symlink/nonliteral rejection + closed outbound allowlist over all specifier forms + exact frozen LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS); fail-closed/closed-set discipline is uniform (registries, status couplings, incomplete-source-consumption fatal, shallow-history fatal, no partial published artifacts, D29 executed=complete-consumption). Task order (1→0→2…), inventory existence rule (D17), ledger/inventory split (D19), driver-owned counted iterators + pre-append accounting gate (D26/D29/D31), atomic no-replace publication with frozen linkSync commit point (D20/D28), physical containment (D21), and flagship eight-group exact-subset + review-set + skipped-weaver coverage-unknown all discharge the stated exit criteria without residual authorization blockers. No hard stops or required edits; authorize Argo execution AS-IS.
